\pdfoutput=1
\documentclass{article}
\usepackage{listings}

\begin{document}

\section{Inline code protection}

Use \verb|%| for comments in LaTeX.

The starred form shows spaces: \verb*|x = y|.

With different delimiters: \verb+\todo{x}+ should survive.

Using lstinline: \lstinline|%foo| and \lstinline{\todo{bar}}.

% This is a real comment that should be stripped.
Some text. % trailing comment

\todo{This todo should be removed}

But \verb|\todo{this}| should NOT be removed.

\begin{verbatim}
% This percent in verbatim stays
\todo{This todo in verbatim stays}
\end{verbatim}

\end{document}
